dir.code: ma_dc, ngay_hl_tu, ngay_hl_den, ma_bp_dc, tk_pb, tk_cp, ma_kh, ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, ma_hd, so_lsx, ma_hd

title.v: khai báo hệ số phân bổ CCDC

items.key: (ma_dvcs in (select ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1) or @@admin = 1)

(exists(select 1 from dmdcct a where a.ma_bp_dc = dmbpcc.ma_bp and a.ma_dc = '{$%c[ma_dc]}') or exists(select 1 from dcbpsddc b where b.ma_bp_den = dmbpcc.ma_bp and b.ma_dc = '{$%c[ma_dc]}')) and status = '1'
items.check: exists(select 1 from dmdcct a where a.ma_bp_dc = dmbpcc.ma_bp and a.ma_dc = '{$%c[ma_dc]}') or exists(select 1 from dcbpsddc b where b.ma_bp_den = dmbpcc.ma_bp and b.ma_dc = '{$%c[ma_dc]}')

command.text: select cast(case when ma_dvcs = @@unit then 1 else 0 end as bit) as dv_yn, b.ten_bp%l as ten_bp_dc%l from &ToolSupplyTable; a join dmbpcc b on a.ma_bp_dc = b.ma_bp where &InternalKey; return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$overlapped nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin hệ số phân bổ đang cập nhật đã được khai báo hoặc lồng nhau, không lưu được.' else N'This item already exists, it can not be saved.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$overlapped = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Phạm vi khai báo ngày hiệu lực không được giao hoặc trùng nhau.' else N'The effective date range must not be overlapped or duplicated.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where &k1;) begin select 'ma_dc' as field, @$exists as message return end if exists(select 1 from @@table with(nolock) where &k3;) begin select 'ngay_hl_tu' as field, @$overlapped as message return end &CommandCheckLockedDate; select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where &k2;) begin select 'ma_dc' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end &CommandCheckLockedDate; if not (&k0;) begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where not (&k2;) and (&k1;)) begin select 'ma_dc' as field, @$exists as message return end end
if exists(select 1 from @@table with(nolock) where &k3; and not (&k2;)) begin select 'ngay_hl_tu' as field, @$overlapped as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where &k1;

action.text: if @ma_bp_dc <> '' select top 1 rtrim(b.ma_dvcs) as ma_dvcs, rtrim(b.tk_pb) as tk_pb, rtrim(c.ten_tk%l) as ten_tk_pb, rtrim(a.tk_cp) as tk_cp, rtrim(d.ten_tk%l) as ten_tk_cp from dmdcct a join dmccdc b on a.ma_dc = b.ma_dc join dmtk c on b.tk_pb = c.tk join dmtk d on a.tk_cp = d.tk where a.ma_dc = @ma_dc and a.ma_bp_dc = @ma_bp_dc else select rtrim(a.ma_dvcs) as ma_dvcs, rtrim(a.tk_pb) as tk_pb, rtrim(b.ten_tk%l) as ten_tk_pb, '' as tk_cp, '' as ten_tk_cp from dmccdc a join dmtk b on a.tk_pb = b.tk where a.ma_dc = @ma_dc return

select top 1 rtrim(b.tk_pb) as tk_pb, rtrim(c.ten_tk%l) as ten_tk_pb, rtrim(a.tk_cp) as tk_cp, rtrim(d.ten_tk%l) as ten_tk_cp from dmdcct a join dmccdc b on a.ma_dc = b.ma_dc join dmtk c on b.tk_pb = c.tk join dmtk d on a.tk_cp = d.tk where a.ma_dc = @ma_dc and a.ma_bp_dc = @ma_bp_dc return
